DeepPhe

A Natural Language Processing System for Extracting Cancer Phenotypes from Clinical Records.

DeepPhe tools combine advanced NLP methods, summarization, data models, and visual analytics tools to help researchers easily understand complex cancer cases and cohorts.

For general background, please read and cite our introductory paper:

DeepPhe - A Natural Language Processing System for Extracting Cancer Phenotypes from Clinical Records Savova, et al. Cancer Res. 2017 Nov. 1. 77(21)e115-e118. DOI:10.1158/0008-5472.CAN-17-0615.


For an introduction to the DeepPhe REST API services:

DeepPhe-CR: Natural Language Processing Software Services for Cancer Registrar Case Abstraction Hochheiser, et al. medRxiv, May 5, 2023. DOI: 10.1101/2023.05.05.23289524

Download DeepPhe

Choose the installer for your operating system.

Recommended for your system Download for Windows 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe_windows-7.1.exe Recommended for your system Download for macOS 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe-7.1.dmg Recommended for your system Download for Linux 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe_linux-x64-7.1.sh
All downloads & source code →

Source code, examples, DeepPhe DB Pipeline, DeepPhe Data API, and DeepPhe-CR are available on the downloads page.
